issues.description: Duration should be 'UntilStartOfYourNextTurn' not 'EndOfTurn'. Card text says 'until the start of your next turn', which is a specific duration different from end-of-turn.
Target should specify 'HasCardName: Charlotte Linlin' condition. Card text restricts to '[Charlotte Linlin]' cards only, not any character.
Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and action 'PlaySelf' is unexplained and appears erroneous. No card text supports automatic self-play. This effect should be removed.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Activate: Main] You may rest this Character: Up to 1 of your [Charlotte Linlin] cards gains +1000 power until the start of your next turn.
